first_run.rationale: The scores are identical, and the reasoning in the justification, strengths, and concerns sections is substantively the same across both evaluations. The minor differences in phrasing are well within the bounds of normal run-to-run variation and do not introduce any new logic or concerns related to the change in the candidate's location from Berlin to Lagos. Both evaluations correctly identify the same core gaps in C++ and domain expertise.
